summary: Comprehensive testing of Sundays Cookie Website - Full cart+order system rebuild. All backend APIs (POST/GET /api/orders) working correctly with MongoDB persistence. All frontend features tested: Hero section with video, Navbar with Process/Menu/Instagram/Cart buttons, Shop section with 'Always Available' (2 cookies) and 'Exclusive Flavours' (5 cookies), quantity selectors, cart functionality, assorted box builder, order form with validation, and order success flow.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created via pytest with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full e2e testing completed. Backend: POST /api/orders creates orders in MongoDB, GET /api/orders returns list with optional phone filter. Frontend: All 7 cookies display with correct prices (Lazy Legend ₹89, Little Rebels ₹219/pack, Dark Side ₹99, After Hours ₹89, Golden Affair ₹109, Midnight Meltdown ₹109, Nutella Lava ₹109). Assorted box ₹649 for 6 cookies (excludes minis). Cart panel works with add/remove/update qty. Order form validates name, phone (10-digit Indian starting 6-9), address. Order success overlay shows WhatsApp confirmation message. Promo section mentions 10% off for Instagram tagging @sundays.hyd. Footer has Instagram link and 'Delivery only' info.

features_tested.navbar: ✓ Process, Menu, Instagram, Cart buttons all present and functional
features_tested.always_available_section: ✓ The Lazy Legend (₹89) with qty selector, Little Rebels (₹219/pack) without qty selector
features_tested.exclusive_flavours_section: ✓ All 5 cookies with correct prices and qty selectors
features_tested.quantity_selector: ✓ 1,2,4,6 options on all cookies EXCEPT Little Rebels (minis)
features_tested.little_rebels_special: ✓ 'Add Pack to Cart' button, no quantity selector
features_tested.weight_info: ✓ Displayed on all cookie cards (65g for regular, 12g each for minis)
features_tested.cart_panel: ✓ Opens from navbar, displays items correctly
features_tested.assorted_builder: ✓ Shows 6 regular flavors (excludes minis), +/- buttons work
features_tested.assorted_6_limit: ✓ 'Add Box to Cart' only enabled when exactly 6 selected
features_tested.order_form_validation: ✓ Name, phone, address required; phone validates 10-digit Indian format
features_tested.order_success_overlay: ✓ Appears after successful order with WhatsApp message
features_tested.backend_get_orders: ✓ Returns saved orders, supports phone filter
